artifact: Computes French share among Story Spotlight cards.
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN language = 'French' AND isStorySpotlight = 1 THEN id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN isStorySpotlight = 1 THEN id END) AS percentage FROM cards;
